body:
## Summary
- add a focused `--focus-question-provenance-runtime` validator route for provenance runtime guards
- add route coverage proving the focused selector stays wired to the provenance guard
- expose CSV contract metadata/provenance counters and summarize whole-bank UHR source metadata drift

## Validation
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' node scripts/validate-content.js --focus-question-provenance-runtime`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' node --test tests/content-test-script-routing.test.js tests/content-question-bank-csv-contract.test.js --test-name-pattern "question provenance|focus-question-provenance|content-focused|test-name-pattern"`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run validate:content`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run typecheck -- --pretty false`
- `npm run lint`
- `npm run test:ownership`
- `node --check scripts/validate-content.js`
- `git diff --check`
title: test: focus question provenance validation
